title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 11 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 11 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 11 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 11/07/2023
DCE iron ore futures market rose by 0.06%. the main contract I2309 closed 807. Most traders adopt separate quotations.Some steel mills tended to be wait-and-see, and purchasing enthusiasm is not high.
